data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Coca-Cola Stock Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
data.description: Coca-Cola offers an annual dividend yield of 2.79%. That's a quarterly dividend amount of 48.5 cents per share. Here's how to earn $500 monthly.

data.title: Tesla Q3 Earnings: Troy Teslike, Gary Black Expects EPS To Fall Below Estimates But Dan Ives Is Optimistic About Elon Musk Addressing EV Demand, Autonomous Driving
data.description: Tesla is slated to post its financial results for the third quarter after the market closes on Wednesday and analysts are bringing their focus back to the EV giant's fundamentals.

data.title: General Motors Q3 Earnings: Revenue And EPS Beat, Raises Annual Profit Outlook On Growing Consumer Demand
data.description: GM's Q3 earnings surpassed expectations, with adjusted EPS of $2.96 and a revenue boost, prompting an increase in 2024 EPS guidance.

data.title: Verizon Q3 Earnings: Wireless Subs Boost with 5G Offers, $1.7B Severance Charge Hit To Profit, Reiterates Annual Outlook
data.description: Verizon stock traded lower on Tuesday after reporting Q3 results, with sales down year over year and missing analyst estimates. EPS beat expectations.

data.title: How Much Money Does It Take To Feel Rich In 2024? Benzinga Poll Reveals The Millionaire Sweet Spot
data.description: A Benzinga reader poll asks how much money you need to be considered rich in 2024. A look at the results and what they mean for retirement.
